message:
fix: apply_patch description includes capability summary (GAP-3.05)

The description was just "Apply code changes using the v4a patch
format." which didn't tell the model what operations the tool supports.
Added "Supports creating, deleting, and modifying files in a single
operation." so the model knows when to use apply_patch vs write_file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
